package.name: a_star_mpc_planner
package.description: A* path planner with MPC trajectory tracking for Unitree G1 humanoid navigation, adapted to the Navigation DLIO stack. Consumes DLIO odometry (/dlio/odom_node/odom) and the g1_local_map ground-removed obstacle cloud (/local_voxel_map/obstacles), plans an A* path on a 2.5D Gaussian grid, and tracks it with a CasADi/IPOPT nonlinear MPC. Velocity is published as a Twist on /mpc/cmd_vel, forwarded to the AMO WebSocket gait by g1_sim_bridge/cmd_vel_to_amo_node.
package.author: Lorenzo Ortolani
